ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The directory from which to pick a random file from. If specified, "exclude directory" will be ignored
ast.target: 用于随机选择文件的目录。如果指定，将忽略“排除目录”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The directory to exclude from the random file picker. This will be ignored if "source directory" is specified
ast.target: 在随机文件选择器中要排除的目录。如果指定了“源目录”，将忽略此项。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the directory name. e.g. Journal, or Books
ast.target: 输入目录名称，例如 Journal 或 Books

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the directory name e.g. Work, Drafts
ast.target: 输入目录名称，例如 Work、Drafts

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid source directory. Checking for excluded directory instead
ast.target: 源目录无效。改为检查排除目录

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid exclude directory. Using all of the vault as source
ast.target: 排除目录无效。使用整个库作为来源

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No markdown files found in the specified directory
ast.target: 在指定目录中未找到 Markdown 文件
